name: delegate-team
description: Agentic engineering supersystem — install once, run /mavis-ship "<task>" or dt run "<task>" anywhere. Bundles the /mavis-ship orchestrator, multi-agent team framework, skill scaffolder, agent-kernel (memory + governance), and four companion frameworks (superpowers, Waza, unslop-preflight, autoresearch) on top of the original dt gateway CLI.
